description_long: This is a slip-on casual shoe with a low-cut design and a rounded toe. The upper is made of a light-colored, patterned textile material, featuring a subtle geometric motif. The sole is thick, white, and appears to be made of lightweight foam or rubber, with a slightly raised heel and a smooth side profile. The interior lining is dark, likely for comfort and contrast, and there is a small pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The shoe lacks any visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its slip-on functionality. Overall, it is designed for comfort and everyday urban use.
description: A light-colored, patterned slip-on shoe with a thick white sole and dark interior lining, designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, geometric pattern on the upper, and the slip-on opening.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low-cut profile, patterned textile upper, and thick white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel, pull tab, and the seamless transition between the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same pattern and sole design.
